channel.title: Documentation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview. It lets you automate reasoning-based tasks such as issue triage, CI failure analysis, and documentation updates using coding agents inside GitHub.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: dotnet: Combining API versioning with OpenAPI in .NET 10 applications
item.description:
The post explains how to add API versioning to .NET 10 applications and document those versions with OpenAPI. It focuses on using both together for clearer API management and documentation.

  • Source: .NET
